title: Walker
short_description: A mechanised infantry action game from DMA Design (later Rockstar North), released by Psygnosis.
description: Walker is an action game developed by DMA Design (later known as Rockstar North) and published by Psygnosis, released in 1993 for the Amiga. The game casts players as a mech pilot fighting across war-torn landscapes. It was developed by Ian Dunlop and Neill Glancy in Edinburgh, and the technology built for it would go on to inspire the creation of Lemmings.
